description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

�新 New posting (Published: July 23, 2026)

We are holding a Raccoon Capture Worker Training Course.

Raccoons are designated invasive species with strong breeding capacity, causing damage to crops and native rare wildlife. After completing this training, you will receive a capture worker certificate without needing a hunting license.

【Date and Time】
August 28, 2024 (Friday) 1:30 p.m. to 4:00 p.m.

【Venue】
Fujimi District Administrative Center

【Eligibility】
Residents or employees aged 18 and over living or working in Hanno City

【How to Apply】
Contact the Agricultural Promotion Division with your address, name, date of birth, and phone number

【Application Deadline】
Monday, August 24

【What to Bring on Training Day】
Photo ID such as a driver's license (your capture worker certificate will be issued after training)

【Other Information】
• People who already hold a capture worker certificate may also retake the training
• The city will loan one capture trap
• Raccoons that are captured will be disposed of by the city
• A reward of 2,000 yen per animal will be paid within budget limits

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kankyokeizaibu/nogyoshinkoka/choju/11587.html
summary: ℹ️ Raccoon Capture Worker Training Course
